hero.rumi.name: Rumi
hero.rumi.bio: Leader of the idol demon-hunters, the voice that weaves the Honmoon. Trained for the stage as much as the front, she leads House Venari.
hero.hermione.name: Hermione
hero.hermione.bio: Prodigy student of the Academy, encyclopedic knowledge and a steady wand. She embodies the path of magic against the demons.
hero.celeste.name: Céleste
hero.celeste.bio: A young huntress trained by Rumi, promised to the Honmoon's firmament. Original to the game, her starlight cuts through the night.
hero.iris.name: Iris
hero.iris.bio: A loyal student of the House of the Badger, patient and warm. Original to the game, her magic shields her own more than it strikes.
hero.iris.specialty: Town Warden — defense and garrison protection
hero.anastasia.name: Anastasia
hero.anastasia.bio: A disciple of Hermione, brave and fiery of the House of the Lion. Original to the game, her offensive magic strikes hard and strikes first.
